tool_name: Industrial Waste Stream Cost, Circularity Rate & ESG Compliance Analysis (ISO 14001 / EU Taxonomy)

inputs.name: Non-Hazardous Solid Waste Generated
inputs.hint: General industrial waste, packaging, non-contaminated scrap — Annex III EU WFD

inputs.name: Hazardous Waste Generated
inputs.hint: Oils, solvents, heavy metal swarf, contaminated rags, chemical waste — EU Directive 2008/98/EC Annex III

inputs.name: Industrial Wastewater Volume
inputs.hint: Process effluent, coolant wash, surface treatment discharge

inputs.name: Waste Diverted from Landfill (recycled + recovered)
inputs.hint: Metal recycling, paper/cardboard, plastic, energy recovery — must not exceed total waste

inputs.name: Non-Hazardous Waste Disposal Rate (landfill/incineration)
inputs.hint: Gate fee to licensed disposal facility. EU range: €50–150/t | Turkey: $30–80/t

inputs.name: Hazardous Waste Disposal Rate
inputs.hint: Licensed hazardous waste contractor. EU range: €200–800/t depending on category

inputs.name: Recycled Material Revenue (metal scrap / recovered material)
inputs.hint: Average net scrap value — steel scrap: $200–400/t | Al: $800–1200/t | Cu: $5000–8000/t

inputs.name: CO₂e per Tonne Non-Hazardous Waste (landfill)
inputs.hint: IPCC AR6: mixed industrial landfill ≈ 300–600 kgCO₂e/t | Incineration: 700–1000 kgCO₂e/t

inputs.name: Potential Regulatory Fine (per violation event)
inputs.hint: From local environmental regulation — EU ELD: up to €1M+ | Turkey: per ÇevKan tariff

inputs.name: Annual Probability of Regulatory Enforcement
inputs.hint: Based on inspection frequency and current compliance status — non-compliant sites: 20–40%

inputs.name: ESG Reporting Framework
options: EU CSRD / ESRS E5 Resource Use

formulas: Total_Waste_Generated_t = non_hazardous_waste_t + hazardous_waste_t   // [t/year] Total solid waste
Waste_to_Landfill_t = MAX(0, non_hazardous_waste_t - recycled_diverted_t)   // [t/year] Non-hazardous waste sent to disposal
Landfill_Cost_USD = Waste_to_Landfill_t * landfill_disposal_rate_usd_t   // [USD/year] Non-hazardous disposal cost
Hazardous_Disposal_Cost_USD = hazardous_waste_t * hazardous_disposal_rate_usd_t   // [USD/year] Hazardous waste cost
Wastewater_Cost_USD = wastewater_m3 * wastewater_treatment_rate_usd_m3   // [USD/year] Wastewater treatment cost
Recycling_Revenue_USD = recycled_diverted_t * scrap_metal_revenue_usd_t   // [USD/year] Revenue from recovered materials
Net_Waste_Cost_USD = Total_Gross_Waste_Cost_USD - Recycling_Revenue_USD   // [USD/year] Net cost after recycling income
Circularity_Rate_pct = Total_Waste_Generated_t > 0 ? (recycled_diverted_t / Total_Waste_Generated_t) * 100 : 0   // [%] EU Taxonomy circularity KPI
Hazardous_Fraction_pct = Total_Waste_Generated_t > 0 ? (hazardous_waste_t / Total_Waste_Generated_t) * 100 : 0   // [%] Hazardous waste intensity
Waste_Intensity_t_per_MtUSD = Net_Waste_Cost_USD > 0 ? Total_Waste_Generated_t / (Net_Waste_Cost_USD / 1000000) : 0   // [t/M USD cost] Waste intensity ratio
Carbon_Footprint_Waste_tCO2e = Waste_to_Landfill_t * co2_per_tonne_waste_kg / 1000   // [tCO₂e/year] GHG from waste disposal
Cost_per_Tonne_Generated_USD = Total_Waste_Generated_t > 0 ? Net_Waste_Cost_USD / Total_Waste_Generated_t : 0   // [USD/t] All-in waste cost per tonne

standards: EU CSRD / ESRS E5 Resource Use & Circular Economy
IPCC AR6 Waste Sector Emission Factors

recycled_vs_generated.error_msg: Diverted waste cannot exceed total waste generated. Check input data — diverted fraction is a subset of total waste.

hazardous_rate_minimum.error_msg: Hazardous disposal rate below $50/tonne is unrealistically low. Licensed hazardous waste disposal is strictly regulated. Check units or confirm contractor rate — legal disposal typically costs $200–800/tonne.

smart_warnings.message: HIGH HAZARDOUS WASTE FRACTION (>20%): Hazardous waste disposal represents a significant cost and liability. Mandatory: (1) Waste audit to identify substitution opportunities (REACH compliance), (2) Solvent recovery system ROI analysis, (3) Licensed contractor insurance verification. Regulatory exposure is elevated.

smart_warnings.source: EU CSRD / ESRS E5 / EU Taxonomy
smart_warnings.message: CIRCULARITY RATE <20%: EU Taxonomy and CSRD require disclosure of circularity performance. Institutional investors and EU supply chain customers will classify this as a sustainability red flag. Circular economy action plan required for continued EU market access and ESG-linked financing eligibility.

EXPECTED REGULATORY PENALTY EXCEEDS RECYCLING REVENUE: Compliance risk is financially material. Investment in waste management systems (proper segregation, licensed storage, treatment capacity) should be evaluated against risk-weighted fine cost. Environmental insurance may be warranted.

SIGNIFICANT WASTE-RELATED EMISSIONS (>100 tCO₂e/year): This waste stream generates reportable Scope 3 emissions under GHG Protocol Category 5. Must be disclosed in CDP, GRI 306, and CSRD reporting. Diversion from landfill (composting, energy recovery, recycling) reduces both cost and carbon footprint.

UNTAPPED RECYCLING REVENUE: Scrap value of recyclable materials exceeds current landfill cost, but less than 50% of non-hazardous waste is being diverted. Increasing recovery rate will reduce costs AND generate additional revenue. Conduct waste composition audit to identify high-value streams.

HIGH ALL-IN WASTE COST (>$200/tonne generated): Above typical manufacturing benchmark. Dominant driver may be hazardous waste, wastewater treatment, or regulatory risk premium. Waste minimisation at source (lean process, material substitution) delivers permanent cost reduction.
